untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'major news events' and precise 1.5-2.0 standard deviation moves from pre-news levels with post-reversal confirmation. These require explicit news event timestamps and intra-bar volatility anchoring not available in standard OHLCV indicators. The 50% retracement logic and 75% target distance back to 'rational level' require external fundamental value estimation. Translated conditions as approximate mean-reversion proxies using Bollinger Bands and volume confirmation, but this does not capture the signal's core news-event-driven mechanism.
translation_notes: Mean reversion approximated using: (1) close crossing sma_50 as rational level proxy, (2) bb_pct_b at 0.5 as 50% retracement confirmation, (3) vol_ratio_20 > 1.0 for volume confirmation. Stop loss set to 0.5 ATR per spec (atr_14). Hold duration set to 5 bars per parameters. Direction set CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal. Actual news event detection and standard deviation anchoring to pre-news price require external data not in indicator set.
